calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for filing of the Stipulation for Judgment and Judgment.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: McCormack Baron Ragan Management.
Plaintiff's Witness: Kieleil Deleon Frazier, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Takiesha Mayo.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1280 Eddy St., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $228.
Holdover Damages $623.20
Costs $245.00, for a Total of $1,096.20
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED. JUL-16-2008: FRANCISCO TORRES, ESQ. FOR PLNTF.; LTD. SCOPE ATTORNEY GREGORY G. ISKANDER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT TAKIESHA MAYO, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JPT IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (218).
